name: Pin Payments
description: Australian developer-focused payment gateway — simple card acceptance APIs, no gateway/merchant account required.

seo.title: Pin Payments — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: Pin Payments: Australian developer-focused payment gateway — simple card acceptance APIs, no gateway/merchant account required.

when_to_use: Simple card acceptance via REST API without merchant account
Charging saved cards for Australian recurring billing
Tokenizing card data for PCI-compliant Australian checkout

review.verdict: Delightful developer experience for Australian card checkout, but card-only and single-country constrain scope.
review.best_for: Australian SMBs and indie devs wanting quick, clean card acceptance
review.not_for: Merchants needing BNPL, bank debit, or multi-country reach

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: No explicit peak-lock evidence; default FALSE per rules.
